title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official CLI and Python/JS bindings for running Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma and other LLMs locally with one command.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK for Ollama: chat, embed, pull, push and manage local models.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript SDK for Node, Deno & browsers to talk to the Ollama REST API.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration that wraps Ollama as a local LLM provider for chains, agents and retrieval.

title: ollama-webui
summary: ChatGPT-style web UI for Ollama (now renamed open-webui) with multi-user, RAG, plugins and dark mode.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama providing synchronous & asynchronous APIs and model management.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Official Ruby gem for interacting with the Ollama REST API in Rails or plain Ruby apps.

title: ollama-cli (community)
summary: Community-built interactive CLI with conversation history, prompt templates and markdown rendering.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns any Ollama model into a GitHub Copilot-like inline code assistant.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Official Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU & CPU node affinity.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official container images (cuda, rocm, cpu) published to Docker Hub with multi-arch support.

title: ollama-chat (Flutter)
summary: Cross-platform Flutter app that chats with Ollama over REST, featuring themes and markdown.

title: ollama-rs
summary: Rust crate providing strongly-typed async client for Ollama with serde and tokio.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration letting you use Ollama models as generators or embedders in pipelines.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: Official C# / .NET SDK for Ollama with async enumerable streaming and dependency injection.

title: ollama-n8n-node
summary: n8n community node that adds Ollama chat & embed actions to no-code automation workflows.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal Python repo showing RAG with Ollama embeddings and Chroma vector store in 50 lines.

title: ollama-vscode
summary: VS Code extension for sidebar chat, code explain, refactor and unit-test generation via Ollama.

title: ollama-mistral
summary: PyPI helper that downloads and serves Mistral-7b through Ollama with a single CLI command.

title: ollama-reddit
summary: Active subreddit for announcements, troubleshooting and showcase of Ollama projects.
